subtasks.description: Extract Microsoft SAM (Software Asset Management) licensing data including licensed user counts, SKUs, and assigned licenses
Extract active user consumption data from facts tables including daily/monthly active users and license utilization metrics
Query licensing database to aggregate licensed user counts by product, department, and cost center
Query consumption facts database to aggregate active users by product, department, and time period
Cross-reconcile licensed user counts from SAM against actual active users from consumption facts; calculate variance, under-provisioning, and over-provisioning by product and department
Analyze financial impact of under/over-provisioning; identify cost optimization opportunities and recommend licensing adjustments
Generate policy recommendations and actions for licensing optimization, including reallocation, right-sizing, and cost recovery opportunities

plan.cost_rationale: This workflow prioritizes cross-reconciliation (mid-tier) and advanced financial analysis (frontier-tier) to identify under/over-provisioning patterns and recommend cost optimization. Extract and SQL query tasks use appropriate tiers for data retrieval complexity. Policy recommendations are mid-tier as they follow from the analysis.

output.notes: No source document was provided in the task. All fields are null because there is no SAM report, license inventory file, or consumption facts data to extract from. Please supply the actual SAM export, Microsoft 365 Admin Center license report, or equivalent document.

output.extraction_notes: No upstream outputs or source documents were provided. Facts tables, SAM data, and Microsoft licensing consumption records are absent from the input. Cannot extract or reconcile any fields.

output.sql: SELECT cf.product, cf.publisher, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) as active_users, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as total_licensed_seats, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as total_spend_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) as distinct_licenses, ROUND(SUM(cf.amount_usd) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id), 0), 2) as cost_per_active_user, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) < SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) THEN 'UNDER_UTILIZED' WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) > SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) THEN 'OVER_PROVISIONED' ELSE 'BALANCED' END as provisioning_status FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' AND cf.publisher = 'Microsoft' GROUP BY cf.product, cf.publisher ORDER BY cf.product, total_spend_usd DESC

SELECT cf.product, cf.publisher, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) as active_users, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as total_active_seats, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as total_spend_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_id) as event_count FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Microsoft' AND cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY cf.product, cf.publisher, cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year DESC, cf.fiscal_quarter DESC, cf.product ASC

{"plan":[{"tool":"sql.snowflake.query","arguments":{"query":"SELECT publisher, product, department, licensed_seats, active_users, total_spend_usd, cost_per_active_user, provisioning_status, (licensed_seats - active_users) AS over_seats, ((licensed_seats - active_users) * (total_spend_usd / NULLIF(licensed_seats,0))) AS estimated_waste_usd FROM finance.license_reconciliation WHERE publisher = 'Microsoft' AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY estimated_waste_usd DESC"},"depends_on":[]},{"tool":"sql.snowflake.query","arguments":{"query":"SELECT publisher, product, department, license_tier, contract_end_date, SUM(total_spend_usd) AS annual_spend, AVG(cost_per_active_user) AS avg_cost_per_user FROM finance.license_reconciliation WHERE publisher='Microsoft' GROUP BY publisher, product, department, license_tier, contract_end_date"},"depends_on":[]},{"tool":"mongo.aggregate","arguments":{"collection":"sam_contracts","pipeline":[{"$match":{"publisher":"Microsoft"}},{"$project":{"product":1,"department":1,"licensed_users_sam":1,"sam_license_cost_usd":1,"contract_end_date":1,"license_tier":1,"renewal_terms":1,"true_up_clause":1}}]},"depends_on":[]},{"tool":"datadog.query_metric","arguments":{"metric":"saas.license.utilization_rate","filter":"publisher:microsoft","window":"90d"},"depends_on":[]},{"tool":"file.write","arguments":{"path":"/reports/financial_impact_analysis.json","content":{"reconciliation_data":"$1.results","contract_terms":"$2.results","sam_contracts":"$3.results","utilization_trends":"$4.results","upstream_reconciliation":"$5_reconcile_licensed_vs_active"}},"depends_on":[1,2,3,4]},{"tool":"confluence.create_page","arguments":{"space":"FINOPS","title":"Microsoft Licensing Financial Impact & Optimization Recommendations - FY2024 Q2","parent":"SA
